title: Unsupported Windows Version
description: Detects devices enrolling with an OS build that has reached end of support: Windows 11 22H2 (build 22621) or older, which includes every Windows 10 build. Maintenance note: raise the build cutoff to 22631 after Windows 11 23H2 reaches end of support on 2026-11-10.
explanation:
This device is running an OS build that has reached end of support:

- **OS:** `{{osVersion}}`
- **Build:** `{{currentBuild}}`

Builds up to 22621 cover Windows 11 22H2 and older as well as every Windows 10 release — Microsoft no longer provides security updates or bug fixes for these versions (exception: LTSC/IoT LTSC editions follow their own lifecycle; verify the edition if this device is LTSC). Devices running unsupported OS versions are exposed to known vulnerabilities and may fail compliance checks.

remediation.title: Update to a supported Windows 11 version
steps: Verify the device meets hardware requirements for Windows 11 23H2 or 24H2
Update the Windows Autopilot deployment profile to use a supported OS image (23H2 or later)
If using a custom OS image, rebuild it with a supported Windows 11 version
For existing devices, deploy a Windows 11 feature update via Intune or Windows Update for Business
